title: Theme Specification
excerpt: Learn the requirements and structure of a Static Website Generator theme.
content:
# Theme Specification

Every Static Website Generator (SWG) theme follows a simple contract. A theme is a standard Astro project that contains a fixed set of required templates. Everything else is completely up to the theme developer.

## Required Directory Structure

```text
src/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ layouts/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ templates/
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ styles/
```

Additional directories may be added as needed.

## Required Layouts

Every theme must contain the following layout:

- BaseLayout.astro

## Required Templates

Every SWG theme must provide these templates:

- Homepage.astro
- Page.astro
- BlogIndex.astro
- BlogCategory.astro
- BlogArticle.astro
- DocsIndex.astro
- DocsCategory.astro
- DocsArticle.astro

These templates form the contract between SWG and your theme.

## JSON First

SWG exports all content as JSON. Themes never communicate directly with the CMS or a database.

Typical export structure:

```text
export/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pages/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ blog/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ categories.json
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ articles/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ docs/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ categories.json
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ articles/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ menus/
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ settings/
```

Themes read these files using helper functions such as `pages.ts`, `blog.ts`, `docs.ts`, `menus.ts` and `settings.ts`.

## Theme Validation

Before packaging a theme, validate it using:

```bash
npm run validate
```

The validator checks the required directories, layouts, templates and configuration files.

## Theme Package

Package your theme with:

```bash
npm run package
```

The generated package can be imported directly into Static Website Generator.

## Theme Freedom

SWG only validates the required contract.

Everything else is entirely up to the theme developer.

Examples include:

- Component structure
- Folder organization
- Styling approach
- Astro component composition
- JavaScript architecture

As long as the required templates exist and validation succeeds, the theme is considered SWG compatible.
meta_description: Specification and requirements for building Static Website Generator themes.
